headline: Essex Property Trust Declares Quarterly Distributions
summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $2.59 per common share, payable July 15, 2026 to shareholders of record as of...

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $282
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $278 to $282.
